title: GUEST CARE - 211info
text: PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION BURNSIDE SHELTER GUEST CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides drop-in services including hot meals, mail services, restrooms, sinks, hygiene products, socks, water fountain, water refill station, crisis care, and information about houseless services. 111 W Burnside Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Age 18 and older experiencing houselessness for most services. Meals are open to families experiencing houselessness as well. Hours: Breakfast: 7 days per week 7am Dinner: 7 days per week 6pm All other services: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 647-7466 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 647-7466 Main phone Reception (503) 647-7466 Burnside Guest Relations Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 6:45am-5pm and 5:45pm-6am TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: MAX red and blue lines, Skidmore Fountain stop. Near bus lines 12, 19, and 20 on the Burnside Bridge. Services: Community Meals Homeless Drop In Centers Personal/Grooming Supplies Public Restrooms Temporary Mailing Address Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - BURNSIDE SHELTER HOUSING/SHELTER - MEN'S CONNECT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION BURNSIDE SHELTER
